channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Giant underground neutrino detector advances understanding of neutrino puzzle
item.description: China's JUNO neutrino observatory, located deep underground, has achieved its first major scientific breakthrough with one of the most precise measurements of neutrino properties.

item.title: Legendary golden fabric lost for 2,000 years recreated
item.description: Researchers in South Korea have revived the ancient "sea silk" once prized by emperors, using fibers from a clam cultivated in Korean coastal waters.

item.title: Tiny holes could transform global water purification
item.description: A nature-inspired membrane with uniform one-nanometer pores filters molecules with high precision, potentially revolutionizing water treatment.

item.title: Lost notebooks unlock 55-million-year-old fossil mystery
item.description: A fossil fish discovered on a New Zealand cliff nearly 30 years ago has been fully explained thanks to an unexpected find.
